stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
A reciprocating engine aeroplane is flying in ISA conditions. Which altitude should a pilot choose to fly: 4000 ft or 10 000 ft?

options.a: 10 000 ft because it is fuel efficient.
options.b: 10 000 ft because of the quicker route.
options.c: 4000 ft because it is fuel efficient.
options.d: 4000 ft because of the lower TAS.
